description: insightService.ts 3,760줄 모놀리식을 5개 도메인 서비스로 분리. barrel re-export로 기존 import 경로 유지. 중복 서비스(costAnalysisService, bomAnalysisService) 통합 후 제거.

userStories.title: profitService 분리
userStories.description: As a developer, I want profit-related functions in a dedicated service so that revenue/profit logic is isolated and testable.
acceptanceCriteria: computeChannelRevenue, computeProductProfit, computeRevenueTrend, computeProfitCenterScore, computeProductBEP 5개 함수가 src/services/profitService.ts에 존재
관련 타입/인터페이스(ChannelRevenueInsight, ProductProfitInsight, RevenueTrendInsight, ProfitCenterScoreInsight, ProfitCenterScoreMetric, ProductBEPInsight 등)도 profitService.ts에 위치
insightService.ts에서 export { ... } from './profitService' barrel re-export 추가
기존 consumer(App.tsx, ProfitAnalysisView, SalesAnalysisView, CostManagementView, DashboardHomeView)의 import 변경 없이 동작
userStories.notes: 완료. profitService.ts(708줄) 생성. 5함수+9타입 추출. barrel re-export 적용. tsc+build 통과. commit: 3a16244

userStories.title: costService 분리
userStories.description: As a developer, I want cost-related functions in a dedicated service so that cost analysis logic is centralized.
acceptanceCriteria: computeMaterialPrices, computeUtilityCosts, computeCostBreakdown, computeLimitPrice, computeCostVarianceBreakdown, computeDailyPerformance, computeMaterialPriceImpact, computeBudgetExpense, computeCashFlow, isSubMaterial, isCostExcluded, diagnoseSubMaterialClassification, determineStatus 13개 함수가 src/services/costService.ts에 존재

관련 타입/인터페이스(MaterialPriceInsight, UtilityCostInsight, CostBreakdownInsight, LimitPriceInsight, CostVarianceBreakdownInsight, DailyPerformanceInsight, MaterialPriceImpactInsight, BudgetExpenseInsight, CashFlowInsight, InventoryAdjustment 등)도 costService.ts에 위치
기존 consumer의 import 변경 없이 동작
userStories.notes: 완료. costService.ts(1265줄) 생성. 13함수+14타입 추출. insightService 3116→1962줄. tsc+build 통과. commit: e822b25

userStories.title: inventoryInsightService 분리
userStories.description: As a developer, I want inventory-related functions in a dedicated service for stock management logic isolation.
acceptanceCriteria: computeStatisticalOrder, computeABCXYZ, computeFreshness, getFreshnessGrade, computeInventoryDiscrepancy, computeInventoryCost, generateRecommendations 7개 함수가 src/services/inventoryInsightService.ts에 존재
관련 타입/인터페이스(StatisticalOrderInsight, ABCXYZInsight, FreshnessInsight, FreshnessGrade, InventoryCostInsight, CostRecommendation 등)도 inventoryInsightService.ts에 위치
기존 consumer(InventoryOrderView.tsx 등)의 import 변경 없이 동작

userStories.title: productionService 분리
userStories.description: As a developer, I want production-related functions in a dedicated service for manufacturing analytics isolation.
acceptanceCriteria: computeWasteAnalysis, computeProductionEfficiency, computeYieldTracking 3개 함수가 src/services/productionService.ts에 존재
관련 타입/인터페이스(WasteAnalysisInsight, ProductionEfficiencyInsight, YieldTrackingInsight 등)도 productionService.ts에 위치
기존 consumer(ProductionBomView.tsx 등)의 import 변경 없이 동작

userStories.title: bomService 분리
userStories.description: As a developer, I want BOM-related functions in a dedicated service for bill of materials logic isolation.
acceptanceCriteria: computeBomVariance, computeBomConsumptionAnomaly, computeBomYieldAnalysis 3개 insightService 원본 함수 + computeSalesBasedConsumption, computeConsumptionVariance, computeBomCoverage, validateBomData, computeBomHealthScore 5개 bomAnalysisService 원본 함수 = 총 8개 함수가 src/services/bomService.ts에 존재
관련 타입/인터페이스(BomVarianceInsight, BomVarianceItem, BomConsumptionAnomalyInsight, BomConsumptionAnomalyItem, BomYieldAnalysisInsight 등)도 bomService.ts에 위치
bomAnalysisService.ts의 consumer가 bomService로 import 변경 완료
userStories.notes: 완료. bomService.ts(953줄) 생성. insightService 3함수 + bomAnalysisService 5함수 통합. commit: e2b1d55

userStories.title: insightService를 오케스트레이터로 축소
userStories.description: As a developer, I want insightService.ts to only contain the orchestration function and re-exports so that its role is clear.
acceptanceCriteria: computeAllInsights()가 새 도메인 서비스의 함수를 import하여 호출
모든 타입과 함수가 barrel re-export로 노출
모든 기존 consumer의 import가 변경 없이 동작
userStories.notes: 완료. insightService.ts 398줄로 축소. DashboardInsights + computeAllInsights + barrel re-exports만 남음. commit: e2b1d55

userStories.title: 중복 서비스 파일 제거 및 consumer 마이그레이션
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove duplicate service files so that there's a single source of truth for each domain.
acceptanceCriteria: costAnalysisService의 유틸 함수(formatCurrency, getMarginColorClass 등)가 적절한 위치로 이동
이전 consumer가 새 서비스 경로로 import 변경 완료
userStories.notes: 완료. bomAnalysisService.ts + costAnalysisService.ts 삭제. ProductionBomView import 경로 변경. commit: e2b1d55

userStories.title: 최종 정리 및 빌드 검증
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a final cleanup pass to ensure no dead code, unused imports, or type errors remain.
acceptanceCriteria: insightService.ts 내에 함수 본문 코드 없음 (re-export + computeAllInsights만)
순환 참조 없음 (빌드 시 circular dependency warning 0건)
userStories.notes: 완료. 전체 검증: insightService 398줄, dead import 0건, circular dep 0건, tsc+build PASS. commit: 6c3b779
